flows.description: Starter flow — plan, implement, review. Uses the developer-friendly `phases` shorthand: the loader auto-expands this into a trigger node + agent nodes connected by sequence edges. Switch to canonical `nodes`+`edges` shape when you need branching, gates, approvals, or loops. CUSTOMIZE the system prompts and agent set for your team's actual workflow.

phases.systemPrompt: TODO: replace with your planning system prompt. The planner reads the intent and produces a stepwise plan.
TODO: replace with your implementation system prompt. The implementer follows the plan and produces concrete changes.
TODO: replace with your review system prompt. The reviewer reads the diff and either approves or requests changes.
